query:
INSERT INTO course_enrollments (userId, courseId, accessCodeId, enrolledAt)
SELECT u.id, c.id, 1, NOW()
FROM users u, courses c
WHERE u.email = 'teststudent@crosslife.test' 
AND c.id NOT IN (
  SELECT courseId FROM course_enrollments 
  WHERE userId = u.id
)
LIMIT 10;
